name: remotion-storyboard
description: Turn video ideas into high-fidelity Markdown storyboards and runtime-specific motion plans.

interface.shortDescription: Generate high-fidelity Markdown storyboards for Remotion or HyperFrames.
interface.longDescription: Converts rough video concepts into structured runtime-specific scene scripts, a premium Markdown storyboard handoff, and implementation guidance for Remotion or HyperFrames.
defaultPrompt: Turn this product promo concept into a 45-second Remotion storyboard with a single premium Markdown handoff.
Turn this launch concept into a deterministic HyperFrames composition plan with track structure, timing attributes, and a single premium Markdown handoff.
